[PDF_PAGE 28 | score=1] court: He suffers a minimum -2 reaction penalty from the lord and court-possibly from all in the region (if his bad advice led to a spectacular failure, like defeat on the battle- field). Depending on the lord’s temper, an Adviser who has fallen into disfavor may face exile or worse until he makes amends. Wealth Options: 3d6x10 gp. Avengbr The venger druid has seen Nature suffer great P rongs. Take the case of the druid Tor- rens. ( illustration.) He had hoped to live as a G P! ardian or Village Druid (listed later in this chppter). However, during his training, forces defiled the area under his protection and sl$w his mentor. Maybe he feels he was too gefltle, too weak. It doesn’t matter. H
[PDF_PAGE 51 | score=1] Terms to discuss include: The size of the battlefield. Until the duel ends, leaving the bounds of the area means conceding defeat. Usually the space is no more than a dozen yards across, to ensure the battle does not take too long. Whether to allow weapons, magical items, granted powers, and spells. (Note: Nondruidic spells cannot be used.) Most con- tests involve full use of weapons and spells, although many commonly disallow magical items. Some memorable duels have permitted only granted powers-no spells or weapons. The combatants used only the claws and fangs of their different animal forms. A few challenges have forbidden all weapons and magic-they became simple wrestling matches. Whethe
[PDF_PAGE 52 | score=1] I I An acolyte’s term of service lasts until the master’s experience level changes or until the acolyte advances a level. In the latter case, the acolyte leaves service, and the inner circle member must select a replacement. e Grand Druid Above all others within the Order stands the figure of the Grand Druid, the highest- tanking (although not the highest-level) druid in the world. The Grand Druid, a 15th- Level character, attains this position through a selection process rather than by the challenge. Since only one person can hold the title of Grand Druid, each world can have only one 15th-level druid at a time. Duties of the Grand Druid. First and fore- most, the Grand Druid acts as a poli
